# HeartPlus

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::HeartPlus;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        HeartPlus { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
plus, like, favorite, add, health, support

## Categories
medical, account, multimedia, gaming, social

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/heart-plus)
